tiles.children_desc: Manage children, birth dates, active child

logs.title: Backend logs
logs.confirm_clear: Really clear all logs? Backup files are kept.
logs.empty: No logs found for the current selection.
logs.no_file: No log file yet. It is created on the first logging event.
logs.endpoint_404_hint: The backend container may not yet run the latest version. Please redeploy on the NAS (Portainer → mybaby stack → Pull & Recreate).

children.no_children_hint: Add your first child to start tracking.

children.purge_warning: ALL data of {{name}} will be deleted irreversibly.
children.purge_counts_label: The following records will be deleted:
children.purge_confirm_label: Type the child's name to confirm:

medication_masters.title: Medication master data
medication_masters.name: Name
medication_masters.no_entries_hint: Add medications to use them in dropdown menus.

tags.title: Tags
tags.name: Name
tags.no_tags_hint: Tags help mark entries for pediatrician or midwife.

descriptions.sleep: Sleep sessions with start/end time, timer mode for ongoing sessions. Helps spot sleep patterns and daily rhythm.
descriptions.feeding: Track breastfeeding, bottle volume and solids. Shows daily totals and average intervals.
descriptions.diaper: Diaper changes by type (wet, dirty, both). Trends across days for care and health monitoring.
descriptions.temperature: Body temperature in Celsius with colour-coded ranges (low / normal / fever). Useful when ill.
descriptions.weight: Weight history in grams with trend and WHO growth curves (P3-P97). Plots percentiles and birth weight.
descriptions.medication: Medication doses with time and amount. Master-data dropdown reduces typos. Critical for ongoing treatment.
descriptions.vitamind3: Daily vitamin D3 dose as a quick action with status (given / pending). Recommended from birth to ~18 months.
descriptions.health: Child well-being — spit-up, tummy ache, crying with intensity, soothing method and duration.
descriptions.tummytime: Tummy-time sessions with timer for motor development and to prevent flat-head. Recommended from birth.
descriptions.todo: Tasks and recurring habits for parents. Includes progress tracking, templates, daily/weekly recurrence.
descriptions.milestones: Developmental milestones (smile, crawl, first words) with photo upload, age-based suggestions and leap calendar.
descriptions.growth: WHO growth curves (weight and length) with P3/P15/P50/P85/P97 percentiles. Preterm mode uses corrected age.
descriptions.checkup: Well-child visits U1 to U9 with recommended time windows. Useful for vaccination/preventive care record.
descriptions.notes: Shared notes for parents and caregivers. With search, pin and Markdown editor for quick entries.
descriptions.tags: Polymorphic tagging of entries (e.g. illness, travel, teething). Shows linked entries on tag detail page.

api_keys.title: API keys
api_keys.name: Name
api_keys.key_visible_once: The key is only shown once!

changelog.title: Changelog
changelog.entries_placeholder:
New feature X
Fixed bug Y
changelog.entries_hint: Each line is shown as a separate bullet point.

quick_actions.title: Quick Actions
quick_actions.description: Configure the 3 quick action buttons on the home page.

breastfeeding.title: Breastfeeding mode
breastfeeding.description: Shows the last breastfeeding side on the home page. Disable if you are not breastfeeding.
breastfeeding.hybrid_desc: Shows breast and bottle tiles simultaneously on the home page.
